calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Reserve
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Reserve
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Reserve
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Feb-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges. Colleen Cohen for Danielle Goaley.

Ms. Alavi stated that the 2010 tax return was audited, that the IRS denied some medical and miscellaneous deductions issuing a deficiency of $7,313.00, and that they were working with the CPA on a short form appeal. Ms. Alavi also stated that she would provide Ms. Cohen with copies of the requested documents (auditing report/tax returns). Status on the reserve was continued to February 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

February 12, 2013 is a holiday. Therefore, the matter is continued to February 19, 2013.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Reserve
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Scott Hodges (Petitioner). Gary Royce for Danielle Goaley.

Mr. Royce requested a continuance stating that the remaining issues are as follow: 1) fiduciary fees 2) two tax returns 3) reserve of $8,500.00 for tax liabilities 4) rents not being deposited into interest bearing accounts. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the above. The Accounting Petition was taken under submission. Status on the reserve was set for August 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Continued To May-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Authorization To Lista Nd Sell Trust'S Real Property And To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement With Real Estate Broker Or In The Alternate To Transfer Property To Beneficiary With Simultaneous Payment Of Debts And Cost Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order) with regard to Danielle Goaley having the opportunity to purchase the property. If Ms. Goaley is unable to perform, Mr. Hodges will list the property.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K.Tauscher.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account And Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Royce for and with Danielle Goaley. Lawrence Siracusa for and with Scott Hodges (Trustee).

The Parties reached a stipulation with regard to the Petition to Sell Real Property which is on calendar for September 19, 2011. The terms of the stipulation were stated on the record. Mr. Royce will prepare a stipulation and order and submit it prior to that hearing date. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. was presented and argued. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. was denied.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Scott Hodges (Trustee). Gary Royce for Danielle Goaley (Objector).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their position with regard to the request for Trustee's fees (1% guideline fees/Case Manager fees). The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad (Landlord/Tenant Counsel) for Scott Hodges. Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges (Trustee).
